nodes.name: changefeed.toml
nodes.summary: TiCDC changefeed configuration specifying the sink URI and downstream target for streaming TiDB CDC events into the integration test pipeline.

nodes.name: pd.toml
nodes.summary: PD (Placement Driver) configuration for the TiDB cluster in the integration test, tuning security, logging, scheduling, and replication settings.

nodes.name: tidb.toml
nodes.summary: TiDB server configuration for the integration test environment, covering logging, security, performance, plan cache, OpenTracing, and TiKV client settings.

nodes.name: tikv.toml
nodes.summary: TiKV storage engine configuration for the integration test, with detailed RocksDB column family tuning, raftstore settings, coprocessor limits, and read pool sizing.
nodes.languageNotes: Extensive RocksDB tuning with separate defaultcf, writecf, and lockcf column family configurations for the TiKV storage layer.
